title: Aubrie Wyn
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Aubrie.jpg]] |name=Aubrie Wyn |homeworld= |birth=c. [[35 BBY/Legends|35 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of [[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] around [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. {{FactFile|129|JAB 5-6|Battle of Jabiim}} establishes that Aubrie Wyn was 13 years old during her fight with [[Alto Stratus]] in the [[Battle of Jabiim]]. Therefore, Aubrie Wyn must have been born around [[35 BBY]]. |death=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]][[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{FactFile|128|JAB 3-4|Battle of Jabiim}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]][[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]] |feathers= |eyes=Brown |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] **[[Padawan Pack]]{{CSWECite|III|337|Wyn, Aubrie}} *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[Sirrus]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I wasn't supposed to die here, I was supposed to train with Master Windu, on Coruscant. My Master said I was destined for the Jedi Council.|Aubrie Wyn|}} '''Aubrie Wyn''' was the [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Sirrus]] and a [[Jedi healer/Legends|Jedi healer]] who served as a [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. At the age of thirteen, Wyn and her Master were sent to Jabiim to aid the Galactic Republic in the [[Battle of Jabiim]]. After the death of Sirrus, Wyn was assigned to the Padawan Pack. When the Republic forces were pushed back by the Separatist-allied [[Jabiimi Nationalists]], the members of the Pack chose to hold off the [[Nationalist Army]] at the [[Cobalt Station]] long enough for the remaining troops to evacuate. She died on the last day of the battle killing [[Alto Stratus]], the leader of the Jabiimi Nationalists. ==Biography== ===Training as a Padawan=== {{Quote|Although, Aubrie is upset at change in plans. She's just been asked to train with Master Windu. It's quite an honor.''"
"''For her or for you?''"
"''Both. But, that will need to wait.|Sirrus and Kenobi|}} The [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] Aubrie Wyn was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] who was [[Reproduction|born]] around [[35 BBY/Legends|35 BBY]]. As a member of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], she [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] under [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Sirrus]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Wyn was one of the best [[Jedi healer/Legends|healers]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and she had been selected for advanced training with Jedi Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]. Sirrus even believed she was destined to serve on the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]. However, before that could happen, she and her Master were dispatched to [[Battle of Jabiim|fight]] on [[Jabiim/Legends|Jabiim]]. ===Battle of Jabiim=== ====Death of Sirrus==== {{Quote|He'll live, Master — only to fight again, you know.|Aubrie Wyn|}} [[File:Aubrie_Force_heal.jpg|thumb|left|170px|Aubrie tends to a wounded Jabiimi soldier.]] Not expecting the savagery of the fighting at Jabiim,{{FactFile|125|JAB 1-2|Battle of Jabiim}} Wyn and her Master joined the advance at [[Outpost Shear]] in search of [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. Wyn objected to Sirrus's motion to heal a [[Unidentified Jabiimi soldier 1|wounded Nationalist soldier]], believing that he would only fight again after he had recovered from his injuries. Regardless, she [[Force healing/Legends|healed]] the [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]],[[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]] leaving her to wonder if the Jedi were soldiers or doctors. Sirrus and Wyn rejoined the others at the camp after the outpost was captured, where Wyn tended to the injured. Shortly thereafter, Stratus launched a massive attack on the Shelter Base. Despite the fact that Skywalker, Kenobi, Alpha, Sirrus, and Wyn arrived in time in a landspeeder with reinforcements at the battle site, the Nimbus commandos planted charges that broke the legs of one of the [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|All Terrain Armored Transports]] before retreating. While Skywalker and Wyn secured their portion of the base, Kenobi, Sirrus, and Alpha rushed to the fallen AT-AT to rescue the clones. The AT-AT exploded unexpectedly, and Kenobi, Sirrus, and Alpha, who did not have time to flee the scene of the explosion, were included in Jabiim's list of victims. While Sirrus died, Kenobi and Alpha were captured by Separatist commander [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] and transported to [[Rattatak/Legends|Rattatak]]. After the death of Sirrus, Wyn became one of the orphaned Jedi Commanders who comprised the [[Padawan Pack]]. ====Member of the Padawan Pack==== {{Quote|Any word from Shelter Base?''"
"''Yeah. We lost three more forward positions… and if we don't get these supplies to Cobalt Station soon, we're gonna lose another…|Anakin Skywalker and Aubrie Wyn|[[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]]}} [[File:Windo_and_Aubrie_fighting.jpg|thumb|250px|Windo Nend and Aubrie Wyn battling against Stratus's droids.]] By the thirtieth day of battle, eighteen Jedi and nine thousand clones had been killed. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Leska]], now the highest-ranking Jedi on Jabiim, ordered the Padawan Pack to avoid the front lines and protect a supply convoy headed toward [[Cobalt Station]], as she refused to send more Padawans to their deaths. By the thirty-second day of battle, while guarding a convoy of [[All Terrain Experimental Transport]]s and [[All Terrain Tactical Enforcer/Legends|All Terrain Tactical Enforcers]], the Padawans were attacked by Stratus's droid forces. Several members of the Pack battled against the droids while Wyn and [[Windo Nend]] remained with the convoy. Upon their return, the two Padawans got the convoy moving. Meanwhile, Skywalker and Wyn led the convoy in their landspeeder. Skywalker reported that they defeated the flanking force, while Wyn informed him of the news back from the [[Shelter Base]]—the Republic lost three more forward positions. Wyn was adjusting well, but Skywalker was having a much harder time. Kenobi's presumed death had clearly had a bad effect on Skywalker: he had become unstable and reckless, which was clearly felt by the other Padawans, especially [[Tae Diath]], who had well-developed telepathic abilities. By the thirty-fourth day of battle, the convoy protected by the Padawan Pack walked directly into a [[Mine/Legends|minefield]] set up by Alto Stratus's [[Nimbus commando]]s. Unable to safely navigate the field, the trapped convoy was quickly attacked by [[Nationalist Army|Stratus's forces]]. While other members of Padawan Pack fought back against their attackers, Wyn held back the Nationalists at Windo Nend's side. The Jabiimi Nationalists soon retreated, allowing the convoy to continue on to Cobalt Station. Once there, while enjoying a brief break in the rain, Wyn and the Padawans witnessed Confederate reinforcements landing on the planet. During a communication with Orliss Gillmunn, the Padawans were informed that General Leska had gone missing and that they were now the highest ranking members of the Grand Army of the Republic on Jabiim. Cobalt Station was the last remaining Republic fortification on the planet, and it stood between Stratus's approaching forces and [[Monsoon Mesa]], the evacuation site for the remaining Jabiimi Loyalists and clone troopers. ====Battle of Cobalt Station==== {{Quote|I'm staying to fight. In the battles to come, the Republic will need all the troops and hardware on that mesa more than they'll need me…|Aubrie Wyn|}} Despite their likelihood of defeat, all of the Padawans agreed to remain at Cobalt Station in order to buy time for the escaping Republic forces. Wyn was initially reluctant to commit herself to what would be an almost certain death, as she was supposed to train with Mace Windu on Coruscant, and as her Master believed, become a member of the Jedi Council. Skywalker offered to send her and Windo Nend to the mesa, but she ultimately decided to stay and fight on her own. All the Jedi, including Anakin, decided to stay as well inspired by Aubrie's speech. The nine Padawans began to prepare for their final battle, mobilizing all combat-ready equipment and surviving clones. At the very last moment, Wyn informed Skywalker that they received a message from Supreme Chancellor Palpatine. Skywalker was ordered to evacuate along with the rest of the Republic forces. He didn't want to abandon his fellow Padawans, but the Chancellor convinced Anakin that they would die anyway, with or without him. Skywalker eventually succumbed to Palpatine's arguments and left Cobalt Station on his [[Zephyr-G swoop/Legends|Zephyr-G swoop]]. Aubrie Wyn, a witness to Anakin's conversation with the Chancellor, was sympathetic to Skywalker's decision and, before leaving, she asked him to take the [[Master Sirrus's holocron|holocron]] of her deceased teacher, Sirrus, with him. The Confederates eventually attacked and found the defense of Cobalt Station to be far stronger than they had anticipated. [[File:Alto_and_Aubrie_death.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Aubrie dies just after she kills Alto Stratus.]] On the forty-third day of the battle, the battle had finally reached Separatist [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Alto Stratus]]'s stronghold. As the battle raged, the Padawans fell one by one, sometimes together. Wyn was the last Jedi to stay alive. Taking up the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] of her fallen comrade [[Vaabesh]], she confronted Alto Stratus face-to-face. Wounded from an earlier hit, Stratus had to defend himself from a grounded position. As Wyn moved in for the kill, Stratus hit her square in the chest with a blaster at point-blank range. As she fell forward, her lightsabers plunged into Stratus' chest, killing him as well. ===Legacy=== {{Quote|You're not victorious yet… You killed half of your people and you've murdered my friends.|Aubrie Wyn's last words|}} [[File:Memorymoths.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The Jedi monument on New Holstice.]] In the end, however, her sacrifice proved to be in vain: the Galactic Republic was forced to retreat, leaving the [[Loyalist/Legends|Loyalists]] on the planet behind cursing at the retreating forces. Following the evacuation, Anakin Skywalker was shown a monument for fallen Jedi built by the planet's natives at the dawn of the Republic on the Republic [[Medcenter/Legends|hospital]] world of [[New Holstice/Legends|New Holstice]]. Skywalker added the names of his fallen comrades to the monument, including Aubrie Wyn, by whispering their names into [[Memory moth/Legends|memory moths]] which would in turn be whispered for eternity by the moth's wings.[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] The struggles of Wyn and the Padawan Pack on Jabiim were later covered up by the administration of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] in an effort to keep negative news of the warfront from reaching the public.[[Republic 61|''Republic'' 61]] ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Since I was a baby, someone else has made all of my choices for me. Today, I get to make my first real decision, on my own. And I'm not going to make the wrong one.|Aubrie Wyn|}} Wyn had light skin, [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and she wore a [[Padawan braid/Legends|Padawan braid]] in her brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]]. She believed that other people made choices for her since her early childhood. Sirrus believed she was destined for service on the Jedi Council. After she and her Master were assigned to fight on Jabiim, Wyn was upset at the change of plans, since she was had been marked for advanced training with Jedi Master Mace Windu, which both she and her Master believed was a honor. Following Sirrus's death, Aubrie Wyn remained calm and collected, unlike Anakin Skywalker whose mind became chaotic and unfocused. She came to believe there was nothing fair about the entire Clone Wars as Anakin was recalled to the evacuation site. Wyn kept her promises, was also loyal to her friends, and quite selfless, even willing to sacrifice her own live during the battle for Cobalt Station. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Relax, my Padawan Aubrie is one of the Jedi Temple's best healers.|Sirrus|}} Aubrie Wyn was regarded as one of best Jedi healers at the Coruscant Jedi Temple. ==Equipment== {{Quote|It's my Master's holocron. I promised him I would return it to the temple. Will you keep that promise for me?|Aubrie Wyn, to Anakin Skywalker|}} Wyn wore simple, brown [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi apparel]] and carried a blue-bladed lightsaber. Sirrus entrusted a [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] to Wyn, to return it to the Jedi Temple on Coruscant. Knowing she would not survive a forthcoming battle for Cobalt Station, Wyn passed the holocron on to Anakin Skywalker. In this way, Wyn was able to keep her promise to her master. ==Behind the scenes== Aubrie Wyn first appeared in the [[2003]] comic book [[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]], written by [[W. Haden Blackman]] and pencilled by [[Brian Ching]]. ==Appearances== *[[Republic 55|''Republic'' 55]] {{1st}} *[[Republic 56|''Republic'' 56]] *[[Republic 57|''Republic'' 57]] *[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Aubrie Wyn}} *{{FactFile|119|ANA 29-30|Anakin Skywalker}} {{Po}} *{{FactFile|125|JAB 1-2|Battle of Jabiim}} *{{FactFile|128|JAB 3-4|Battle of Jabiim}} *{{FactFile|129|JAB 5-6|Battle of Jabiim}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Aubrie Wyn |es=Aubrie Wyn |pl=Aubrie Wyn |deGA=1 }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Wyn, Aubrie}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Commanders]] [[Category:Jedi healers]] [[Category:Jedi trainees of the Jedi Order]]
